texto: Damn this human who had come into her life and made himself so important to her
autor: had made coming to terms with her inner monster that much more difficult to bear.
explicacao: Citação de had made coming to terms with her inner monster that much more difficult to bear. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Damn this human who had come into her life and made himself so important to her” articula reflexao, samantha-young, blood-will-tell em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como blood-will-tell.
